raw_relative_lower_bound.statement: for all even n > threshold, (1 - relativeError) * goldbachSingularSeriesFromQuarter(n) * n <= RawVonMangoldtGoldbachSum(n)

contamination_dominated.statement: for all even n > contaminationThreshold, 2 * vonMangoldtWeightSumContaminationBudget(canonicalNonPrimePrimePowerVonMangoldtWeightSumBound, n) < (1 - relativeError) * (1/4) * n

notes: Template only. This is the narrow one-sided quarter Hardy-Littlewood lower-bound handoff: prove the raw von Mangoldt convolution is at least (1 - relativeError) times the fixed quarter singular-series main term, plus explicit canonical contamination domination. It intentionally does not ask for the upper side of a normalized absolute-error estimate.
